LanguageData.ABY_Difficulty_Subheader: Sets the global summon calibration profile. Higher settings intensify composition, instability and boss pressure without bypassing progression gates.
LanguageData.ABY_Difficulty_TelemetrySummary: Protocol: {0} • Encounter x{1} • Instability x{2} • Rewards x{3}
LanguageData.ABY_Difficulty_ButtonHint: These settings raise pressure and late-stage calibration only. They do not unlock future content before its normal sigil / boss-drop / research gates.
LanguageData.ABY_Difficulty_Severe_Desc: Cleaner assault packs, slightly stronger elites and harsher ritual instability.
LanguageData.ABY_Difficulty_Rupture_Desc: Escalates elite density and tempo while keeping progression order intact.
LanguageData.ABY_Difficulty_Dominion_Desc: Endgame pressure profile. Dominion calibration runs hotter and support cadres scale harder.
LanguageData.ABY_Difficulty_FinalGate_Desc: Apex crisis calibration with the strongest composition pressure and instability backlash.
LanguageData.ABY_Difficulty_ConsoleImpact: Profile effect: encounter x{0}, instability x{1}, rewards x{2}
